heading: About Us
description: {{appName}} - A recruitment and job information channel for every Business and candidate. We believe in bringing "HOPE" to Businesses seeking talent and to candidates seeking career opportunities. With 2 systems: Website for Employers and Application for Job Seekers, {{appName}} will bring fresh and exciting experiences; connecting the dream of conquering work for every talent and helping businesses build a strong human resources team.

features.careerTitle: Job Portraits - Go the Right Way
features.careerDesc: Discover the right job for your career direction. Detailed information on job requirements, environment, and development opportunities at each company.
features.cvDesc: Build a professional application profile with a smart CV creation tool. Optimize your profile with beautiful CV templates for each industry.
features.locationDesc: Find ideal job opportunities in your area. With smart positioning features, it suggests suitable jobs near where you live.
features.notificationDesc: Don't miss opportunities with a smart notification system. Receive instant information about new job positions that match your skills.

cvProfileDetail.title: Create CV & Profile
cvProfileDetail.desc1: Build a professional application profile with a smart CV creation tool.
cvProfileDetail.desc2: Optimize your profile with beautiful CV templates, suitable for each industry.
cvProfileDetail.desc3: Easily update and adjust your CV according to employer requirements, increasing the chances of being noticed and selected for the desired position.

aroundJobDetail.title: Jobs Around You
aroundJobDetail.desc1: Find ideal job opportunities in your area.
aroundJobDetail.desc2: With smart positioning features, we suggest suitable jobs near where you live.
aroundJobDetail.desc3: Save travel time and enjoy a work-life balance with job opportunities within your desired radius.

notificationDetail.title: Job Notifications Anytime
notificationDetail.desc1: Don't miss any chance with a smart notification system.
notificationDetail.desc2: Receive instant information about new job positions that match your skills and wishes.
notificationDetail.desc3: Customize notification criteria such as salary, location, industry to ensure you always update the best opportunities on the market.
